name: openclaw-manager
description: Multi-project control plane for running and operating many raw OpenClaw gateways.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
